article.body_preview:
DHAKA, Feb 6, 2023 (BSS) - Bangladesh Garment Manufacturers and Exporters Association (BGMEA) and SOWTEX along with Confederation of Indian Textile Industries (CITI) have planned two Textile Sourcing Meets'23 and Road Show in India from February 9 to 12.

The event will be led by BGMEA President Faruque Hassan and Vice President Shahidullah Azim along with a team of delegates from Bangladesh RMG Industries.

The BGMEA team is going for close interaction with top Indian Textile Manufacturers in a

llm_connections.evidence_quote: can contribute $15 billion of raw material support from India in the next 3-5 years.
llm_connections.scope_justification: The article explicitly quantifies $15 billion of raw material support from India to Bangladesh over 3–5 years, which is a country-level import volume as defined for 'imports'.

llm_connections.evidence_quote: open up additional land ports and ease the congestion in Petrapole-Benapole border and better connectivity via train for smooth flow of raw materials from India to Bangladesh.
llm_connections.scope_justification: The article explicitly links opening land ports and easing border congestion to a 'smooth flow of raw materials from India to Bangladesh', addressing country-level import movement consistent with the 'imports' definition.
